tasks.title: Confirm visa documents are complete
tasks.detail: Double-check passport validity, CAS details, and proof of funds before travel.

tasks.title: Download university status letter template
tasks.detail: Prepare a digital copy so bank account and admin steps are faster after arrival.

tasks.title: Prepare housing and ID document pack
tasks.detail: Keep tenancy agreement, passport, visa proof, and offer letter in one folder.

tasks.title: Set first-month budget
tasks.detail: Estimate rent, groceries, transport, and emergency spending for your first month.

tasks.title: Register with a GP surgery
tasks.detail: Do this soon after settling so healthcare access is ready when needed.
tasks.sourceTitle: How to Register with a GP (NHS)

tasks.title: Apply for National Insurance number
tasks.detail: Needed for legal employment and correct tax setup in part-time or full-time work.
tasks.sourceTitle: Apply for a National Insurance Number (GOV.UK)

tasks.title: Submit council tax student exemption
tasks.detail: Use your student proof to avoid paying full council tax where eligible.

tasks.title: Open a UK bank account
tasks.detail: Compare student accounts and keep your enrollment letter ready for verification.

tasks.title: Enable spending alerts and limits
tasks.detail: Turn on transaction notifications to avoid overspending during early setup weeks.

tasks.title: Create a small emergency buffer
tasks.detail: Aim for a minimum reserve so unexpected transport or medical costs are covered.

tasks.title: Buy a 16-25 Railcard (if eligible)
tasks.detail: Can reduce train fares significantly during term and holiday travel.

tasks.title: Check local student transport pass
tasks.detail: Many cities offer discounted bus or metro options for students.

tasks.title: Save key routes in transport apps
tasks.detail: Pre-save campus, accommodation, supermarket, and nearest hospital routes.
